mods.name: Boost Controller
mods.description: Increase boost on the RB26DETT twin-turbo setup safely with an electronic boost controller. The easiest and most cost-effective power upgrade.
mods.installNotes: Install inline with the wastegate vacuum line. Set base boost to factory 10 psi, then increase in 1 psi increments. Monitor knock with a detonation sensor. Stock ceramics handle 14 psi.

mods.name: Turbo-Back Exhaust
mods.description: Full 3-inch turbo-back exhaust system for the RB26DETT. Dramatically improves exhaust flow and delivers the iconic straight-six turbo note.
mods.partNumbers: Tomei Expreme Ti 440003, HKS Super Turbo 31029-AN002
mods.installNotes: Replace from downpipe to rear exit. 3-inch diameter minimum. Bolt-on with factory hanger locations. 2 hour install on a lift.

mods.name: Front-Mount Intercooler
mods.description: Replace the factory side-mount intercoolers with a large front-mount unit for dramatically reduced intake temperatures under sustained boost.
mods.partNumbers: GReddy Type 29R, HKS R-Type FMIC Kit
mods.installNotes: Remove side-mount intercoolers and route new piping to the FMIC. May require trimming of front bumper support. Use silicone couplers and T-bolt clamps. 4+ hours.

mods.name: Upgraded Fuel Injectors
mods.description: The factory 444cc injectors limit power around 350hp. Larger injectors are essential for any serious power build on the RB26DETT.
mods.installNotes: Remove fuel rail and swap all 6 injectors. Apply fresh O-rings. Requires ECU retune to match new flow rates. Combine with fuel pump upgrade for full benefit.

mods.name: Coilover Suspension
mods.description: Modern coilovers bring the R33 chassis into the 21st century with adjustable ride height and damping. Critical for getting the heavy GT-R to handle.
mods.partNumbers: HKS Hipermax IV GT 80230-AN007, BC Racing BR Series
mods.installNotes: Full strut replacement at all corners. Set ride height 20–30mm below stock. ATTESA AWD benefits from balanced ride height front to rear. Full alignment required.

mods.name: Upgraded Turbochargers
mods.description: Replace the factory ceramic T28 turbos with ball-bearing steel-wheel units for faster spool, higher power ceiling, and better reliability at elevated boost.
mods.installNotes: Remove factory turbos from exhaust manifold. Bolt-on replacements use stock manifold. Transfer oil and coolant lines. New gaskets essential. Retune required. 10+ hours.

mods.name: Standalone ECU
mods.description: A standalone ECU replaces the factory unit for full engine management control, required for builds targeting 400+ hp on the RB26.
mods.partNumbers: Link G4X PlugIn ECU, Haltech Elite 2500
mods.installNotes: Plug-in ECU is the simplest path. Configure base maps for RB26 and refine on dyno. Handles boost control, ATTESA integration, and launch control. 8+ hours for install and base tune.

mods.name: Upgraded Brake System
mods.description: The R33 GT-R is heavy and needs upgraded brakes for track use. Larger rotors and multi-piston calipers provide the stopping power to match the engine output.
mods.partNumbers: Brembo GT 1B2.8055A, Project Mu SCR-PRO rotors
mods.installNotes: Requires 18-inch wheels for caliper clearance. Replace front and rear as a set for balanced braking. Bleed with high-temp DOT 4 fluid. Bed pads with 20 moderate stops.
